Runtime per caller

Mean wall-clock seconds per sample (successful runs). Hover a bar for detail.

Sensitivity per caller

Share of truth deletions detected (any matching call; common deletion within ±80 bp, others ±250 bp). Evaluation only — callers are third-party.

Speed vs sensitivity

Lower-left = fast; upper = more sensitive. The reference caller is highlighted.
